title: Session-start 'where we left off' continuation line in startup banner
current_state: agent/startup_banner.py format_banner emits 3 lines (mode/session/tools, telegram/scheduler/verify/turns, reminders/tickets) plus optional 4th line from memory.audit_banner_line. Session feels cold despite Pi having a session_history L3 entry written at on_exit by _do_session_summary.
structural_problem: ChatGPT/Claude continue seamlessly. Pi has all the data â€” last session_summary in L3, last touched ticket file in tickets/closed/ â€” but never surfaces it on next start.
target_state: agent/startup_banner.py grows a continuation line built from: (1) most recent L3 row with category='session_history' â€” the auto-written session summary, (2) most-recently-modified closed ticket file. Output: 'Last session 2026-05-24 14:32 Â· "discussed UX upgrades, decided plan-mode first" Â· last touched T-099'. Falls back to '' silently if no data.
files_affected: agent/startup_banner.py â€” add _format_continuation_line() helper, append to lines_out before reminders block
design_notes: Query L3 directly via sqlite3.connect â€” do not import MemoryTools (keeps startup_banner.py import-safe and fast; no Supabase chain pull).
SQL: SELECT content, created_at FROM l3_cache WHERE category='session_history' AND invalid_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
Recent ticket: max(p.stat().st_mtime for p in tickets/closed/*.json) â€” already cheap.
Cap continuation text to 80 chars to keep banner scannable. Truncate with ellipsis.
All reads wrapped in try/except â†’ return '' on any failure (Inv. 9 spirit).
Skip if no L3 row found AND no closed tickets (fresh repo) â†’ return '', banner unchanged.
Privacy: in god mode startup, query god_memory.db; in public startup, query pi.db. ModeConfig determines path.
success_criteria: Banner shows continuation line when L3 has session_history row + closed tickets exist
Empty repo (no session_history, no closed tickets) â†’ continuation line absent, banner unchanged
L3 read failure â†’ continuation absent, no crash
Text truncated at 80 chars with ellipsis
risk_notes: Lowest risk. Read-only SQLite query + file mtime check. Mitigations: every read in try/except, fallback to ''.
migration_plan: 1. Add _format_continuation_line() helper in startup_banner.py â€” direct sqlite3 query, no MemoryTools import.
2. Append to lines_out after the existing 4th audit line, before reminders.
3. Test with mocked DB: 0 rows, 1 row, multiple rows.
4. Manual smoke: run pi.py with prior session_history L3 row â†’ banner shows continuation.
